function addNodes(nodes, cy) {
  nodes.forEach((node) => {
    const nodeData = {
      id: node.id,
      labelText: node.label,
      height: node.height,
      width: node.width,
      padding: node.padding ?? 0
    };
    Object.keys(node).forEach((key) => {
      if (!["id", "label", "height", "width", "padding", "x", "y"].includes(key)) {
        nodeData[key] = node[key];
      }
    });
    cy.add({
      group: "nodes",
      data: nodeData,
      position: {
        x: node.x ?? 0,
        y: node.y ?? 0
      }
    });
  });
}
(0,_chunk_AGHRB4JF_mjs__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__/* .__name */ .eW)(addNodes, "addNodes");
function addEdges(edges, cy) {
  edges.forEach((edge) => {
    const edgeData = {
      id: edge.id,
      source: edge.start,
      target: edge.end
    };
    Object.keys(edge).forEach((key) => {
      if (!["id", "start", "end"].includes(key)) {
        edgeData[key] = edge[key];
      }
    });
    cy.add({
      group: "edges",
      data: edgeData
    });
  });
}
